description.value: Aura moderate enchantment, evocation, and illusion; CL 10th; Slot armor; Price 4,890 gp; Weight 30 lbs. DESCRIPTION This +1 glamered scale mail is decorated with fangs and is usually made from the hide of a reptilian beast such as a basilisk. The wearer can use burst bonds and wrath each once per day; as a full-round action, the wearer can activate both of these abilities at the same time CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells burst bonds, disguise self, wrath; Price 2,590 gp
